title: stravadium rubrum
intro: Stravadium rubrum, also known as Red Wine Vine, is a type of flowering plant in the family Vitaceae. The plant is native to Europe and Western Asia, and its medicinal properties are attributed to its high anthocyanin content. The medicinal properties of Stravadium rubrum include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems and cardiovascular diseases. Stravadium rubrum can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, capsules, and tinctures, making it a popular choice for natural health enthusiasts and herbalists.
intro_study: According to "Zhong xi yi jie he za zhi = Chinese journal of modern developments in traditional medicine", Stravadium rubrum (also known as Rheum) benefits include retarding the progression rate of renal failure and improving uremic symptoms, as well as suppressing the proliferation of glomerular mesangial cells and decreasing the level of azotemia in animal studies.
